description: Living embodiments of primal forces -- fire, water, earth, and air given will and form.
subraces: Invisible whirlwinds speaking in howling gusts and scattering anything not bolted down.
Grinding masses of stone and soil rising from the ground to crush with seismic force.
Roaring pillars of living flame consuming everything combustible in their path.
Surging waves given shape, drowning foes in crushing torrents of sentient water.
Glacial constructs radiating killing cold, shattering into razor shards when struck.
Slow-moving molten giants leaving scorched footprints and igniting the earth beneath them.
Crackling bolts of living electricity arcing between targets in blinding chain strikes.
